Theme-previews System Settings — Breeze / Breeze sombre (2026-06-21).

Sources Capsule desktop (2879×1799) :
  usr/share/capsuleos/assets/images/vendors/neon/systemsettings/source-previews/
  - breeze-light-capsule-desktop.png
  - breeze-dark-capsule-desktop.png
  Traçabilité : source-previews/SOURCE-CAPSULE-PREVIEWS.txt

Dérivés theme-previews/ (cover-crop PNG optimisé) :
- hub-breeze-vm.png — 600×337 ← breeze-light (cartes Paramétrage rapide)
- hub-dark-vm.png — 600×337 ← breeze-dark
- appearance-breeze-vm.png — 200×130 ← breeze-light (grille Thème global)
- appearance-dark-vm.png — 200×130 ← breeze-dark
- plasma-breeze-vm.png, plasma-light-vm.png — 600×337 ← breeze-light
- plasma-dark-vm.png, colors-breeze-dark-vm.png — 600×337 ← breeze-dark

Autres previews (pull VM Plasma LnF ou crops focus) :
- hub-auto-vm.png ← org.kde.breezetwilight.desktop preview.png
- appearance-twilight-vm.png, appearance-oxygen-vm.png ← crops VM
- colors-oxygen-*.png, plasma-oxygen-vm.png ← pull VM

Procédures :
  bash root/tools/lab/pull-kde-neon-settings-theme-previews.sh
  python3 root/tools/lab/ingest-kde-neon-breeze-previews.py --light … --dark …
  node usr/lib/capsuleos/tools/lab/extract-kde-settings-vm-tile-crops.mjs --write

Manifeste : root/tools/lab/kde-neon-settings-theme-previews-manifest.json

KCM Couleurs/Style Plasma rendent des previews procédurales ; Capsule réutilise preview.png LnF du paquet Plasma (ground truth packagé KDE, ¬capture).
